mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO coach_weekly_schedule (instructor_id, week_day, time_slot, status) VALUES
(#{schedule.instructorId}, #{schedule.weekDay}, #{schedule.timeSlot}, #{schedule.status})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select:
SELECT di.instructor_id, user_id, instructor_name, phone, id_number, entry_date, instructor_no, di.status, teaching_years, schedulable_time_start, schedulable_time_end, no_time_start, no_time_end, photo, good_subject , content, certificate, di.del_flag,dc.plate_number, dr.rating_id, student_id, contanct, dr.score, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ddlt2.driver_license_name ORDER BY ddlt2.driver_license_code SEPARATOR ',') FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type_instructor ddlti2 LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type ddlt2 ON ddlt2.driver_license_id = ddlti2.driver_license_id WHERE ddlti2.instructor_id = di.instructor_id ), '') as driver_license_name, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ddlt2.driver_license_code ORDER BY ddlt2.driver_license_code SEPARATOR ',') FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type_instructor ddlti2 LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type ddlt2 ON ddlt2.driver_license_id = ddlti2.driver_license_id WHERE ddlti2.instructor_id = di.instructor_id ), '') as driver_license_code, (select COUNT(*) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor_student dis WHERE di.instructor_id=dis.instructor_id ) as student_num
# COUNT(*) OVER() as total_count FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor di LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_car dc ON di.instructor_id = dc.instructor_id LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_rating dr ON dr.instructor_id = di.instructor_id WHERE di.status = '0'

SELECT di.instructor_id, user_id, instructor_name, phone, id_number, entry_date, instructor_no, di.status, teaching_years, schedulable_time_start, schedulable_time_end, no_time_start, no_time_end, photo, good_subject , content, certificate, di.del_flag,dc.plate_number,dc.status,dc.car_type,dc.mot_expires, dc.buy_date,dc.car_color,dc.car_name,dc.car_brand, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ddlt2.driver_license_name ORDER BY ddlt2.driver_license_code SEPARATOR ',') FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type_instructor ddlti2 LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type ddlt2 ON ddlt2.driver_license_id = ddlti2.driver_license_id WHERE ddlti2.instructor_id = di.instructor_id ), '') as driver_license_name, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ddlt2.driver_license_code ORDER BY ddlt2.driver_license_code SEPARATOR ',') FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type_instructor ddlti2 LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type ddlt2 ON ddlt2.driver_license_id = ddlti2.driver_license_id WHERE ddlti2.instructor_id = di.instructor_id ), '') as driver_license_code, (select COUNT(*) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor_student dis WHERE di.instructor_id=dis.instructor_id ) as student_num, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_rating dr WHERE di.instructor_id=dr.instructor_id) as rating_num, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(score),1) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_rating dr2 WHERE di.instructor_id= dr2.instructor_id AND dr2.score IS NOT NULL ) AS over_all_rating
FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor di LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_car dc ON di.instructor_id = dc.instructor_id where di.instructor_id = #{instructorId} AND di.status = '0'

SELECT di.instructor_id, user_id, instructor_name, phone, id_number, entry_date, instructor_no, di.status, teaching_years, schedulable_time_start, schedulable_time_end, no_time_start, no_time_end, photo, good_subject , content, certificate, di.del_flag,dc.plate_number,dc.status,dc.car_type,dc.mot_expires, dc.buy_date,dc.car_color,dc.car_name,dc.car_brand, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ddlt2.driver_license_name ORDER BY ddlt2.driver_license_code SEPARATOR ',') FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type_instructor ddlti2 LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type ddlt2 ON ddlt2.driver_license_id = ddlti2.driver_license_id WHERE ddlti2.instructor_id = di.instructor_id ), '') as driver_license_name, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ddlt2.driver_license_code ORDER BY ddlt2.driver_license_code SEPARATOR ',') FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type_instructor ddlti2 LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_driver_license_type ddlt2 ON ddlt2.driver_license_id = ddlti2.driver_license_id WHERE ddlti2.instructor_id = di.instructor_id ), '') as driver_license_code, (select COUNT(*) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor_student dis WHERE di.instructor_id=dis.instructor_id ) as student_num, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_rating dr WHERE di.instructor_id=dr.instructor_id) as rating_num, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(score),1) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_rating dr2 WHERE di.instructor_id= dr2.instructor_id AND dr2.score IS NOT NULL ) AS over_all_rating
FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor di LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_car dc ON di.instructor_id = dc.instructor_id WHERE di.instructor_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{instructorName},'%') AND di.status = '0'
SELECT week_day, time_slot, status FROM ms_stu_pro339.coach_weekly_schedule WHERE instructor_id = #{instructorId} ORDER BY week_day, time_slot

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM driving_instructor WHERE del_flag = '0') AS instructor_num, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM driving_instructor di WHERE del_flag = '0' AND di.status = '0') AS on_job_num, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(score),1)FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_rating WHERE driving_rating.score IS NOT NULL ) AS rating_avg, CONCAT( ROUND( COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN cws.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) *100.0/ NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cws.status != -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) FROM ms_stu_pro339.coach_weekly_schedule cws WHERE cws.instructor_id IN (SELECT di2.instructor_id FROM driving_instructor di2 WHERE di2.status='0' AND di2.del_flag='0')),0 ),1) ,'%')AS average_workload FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor LIMIT 1
